summary: Representative #49888 is already closed. The open refs split into subfamilies: #14785 remains the canonical tool-schema/prompt-overhead tracker, #52861 and #14619 stay open as related scoped follow-ups, #53540 remains its own canonical provider/large-tool-parameter timeout tracker, and the other hydrated open refs are not close candidates for this dedupe-only cluster. No close, merge, or fix artifact is planned.
